name: Intent Lock
description: Stay accountable to a self-defined browsing goal with local semantic drift detection.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; object-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://huggingface.co https://*.huggingface.co https://cdn-lfs.huggingface.co https://*.hf.co
